---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation that this feature would address. Why is this needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal solution or how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? Describe alternatives here.

## Benefits

How would this feature benefit users or the project? Who would it help?

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how you would use this feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or relevant information here.
